positive: Minimalist geometric fox silhouette perched atop a stylized lunar crescent, surrounded by glowing nebula wisps and constellations. Clean vector style, negative space optimized, high contrast black and white palette with accents of deep indigo and electric cyan. Central composition, highly detailed linework, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Studio lighting, crisp lines, symmetrical balance, vibrant flat design elements, art deco inspired.
